attributes.description: This dashboard shows Incident collected by the BeyondTrust ISI Integration.

panelsJSON.title: Top Source of the Impacted Entities
Top Location of the Impacted Entities

params.markdown:
This dashboard provides visibility into incidents detected by BeyondTrust ISI.

It includes a control panel with filters like **Entity Type** and **Severity** for quick analysis. A key metric highlights the **Total Incidents**. Pie charts show **Incidents by Severity**, **Incidents by Type**, and **Incidents by Entity Type**. Tables provide insights into the **Top Sources**, **Top Locations**, and **Top Entities**.

Together, these visualizations help monitor incident trends and analyze impacted entities efficiently.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/beyondtrust_isi/overview)
